Jan
Majcher

PhD · Technical Lead · Marine Geo

5+ peer-reviewed publications related to seabed mapping 8+ years offshore processing & marine geospatial

I combine a research-grade understanding of marine geoscience with hands-on expertise in developing scalable GIS automation workflows. My work spans offshore wind, subsea cable routing, underwater archaeology, and seabed mapping. I value strong teamwork and a culture of knowledge sharing, whether working remotely, offshore, or in the office.

Currently Geospatial Lead at Green Rebel — MBES/SSS/SBP pipelines, GIS delivery frameworks, and AI-powered Python automation across major European offshore energy projects.

Based in Italy. Remote worldwide · hybrid · occasional offshore rotations.

About

Geoscientist & Oceanographer,

I combine a research-grade understanding of marine geoscience with hands-on expertise in building GIS automation that scales. My work spans offshore wind, subsea cable routing, underwater archaeology, and seabed mapping.

Currently working as Geospatial Lead at Green Rebel, responsible for MBES/SSS/SBP data processing pipelines, GIS delivery frameworks, and AI-powered Python automation across major European offshore energy projects.

Based in Italy. Available for remote work worldwide, hybrid arrangements, and occasional offshore rotations.

Selected Work

Projects & Research

Commercial Projects

QGIS Plugin · Green Rebel · 2024–present

AutoLine — AI-Powered Survey Line Planner

AI-powered QGIS plugin for automated survey line planning. Dynamic line spacing and orientation calculated from coarse-grid bathymetry; crossline design and survey statistics. Reduced vessel sail time by 10–20% in two case studies.

Plugin Repository on GitHub →
PythonPyQGISAI/MLAutomation

Offshore Wind · 2023–present

SSE Arklow Bank 2 — Full Survey Processing/GIS Suite

End-to-end MBES, SSS, and GIS delivery for a major Irish offshore wind farm survey. Co-responsible for pipeline architecture, QA/QC, report coordination, and final geodatabase delivery.

ArcGIS ProQGISQimeraFMGTPython

Subsea Cable · 2024

Celtic Interconnector — Nexans Cable Route

QC and full geospatial processing suite for the France–Ireland HVDC interconnector cable route survey, one of Europe's longest subsea cable projects.

MBESSSSGIS QCPython

Subsea Cable · Offshore · 2024

MDM Irish Sea Cables

Onboard presence during the geophysical campaign: QC, data processing, and SSS acquisition. Reporting and final deliverable GIS data QC. Client representative during the follow-on geotechnical survey campaign.

SSSMBESOffshoreClient Rep

Scientific Projects

Remote Sensing · Green Rebel · 2025

Semi-Automated Seabed Boulder Detection

Hybrid GIS-AI workflow combining bathymetric position index filtering with a Random Forest classifier to detect seabed boulders from high-resolution MBES data. Achieved 83% recall — slightly outperforming expert manual picking. Applied across 79 km² identifying 75,000+ contacts. Published in Remote Sensing (MDPI).

Read paper in Remote Sensing →
QGISPythonRandom ForestMBESGDAL

Research GIS · Post-Doc · 2022–2024

ENDURE — Pan-European Marine Heritage GIS

Post-doctoral GIS research at the National Museum of Denmark. Designed a multi-year hydrographic database integrating EMODNet, Copernicus, and BioOracle datasets for underwater heritage risk modelling across Europe.

endureerc.com →
ArcGIS ProEMODNetCopernicusPythonBioOracle

PhD Research · 2018–2022

Change Detection on Submerged Historical Assets

Popular science feature article for Hydro International summarising my PhD project — combining CFD hydrodynamic modelling, Python automation, and repeat MBES surveys to detect and predict structural change at historic shipwreck sites.

Read feature article on Hydro International →
CFDPythonMBESOpenFOAMCloudCompare

NATO · Baltic Sea · 2016

MODUM — UXO SSS Monitoring, Baltic Sea

GIS spatial analysis of side-scan sonar data for unexploded ordnance monitoring under NATO framework. Automated feature tracking and GIS target classification across multi-temporal SSS datasets.

SSSGIS AnalysisNATO
